messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0028",
  "title": "游戏内容与系统",
  "page_index": 16,
  "page_range": "16"
}

Section text:
游戏内容与系统

message.content: This section contains only the heading "游戏内容与系统" (Game Content and Systems) on page 16, with no accompanying body text, data, or visual elements. It can only answer structural or navigational questions, such as identifying the section title on page 16 or confirming the document's organizational structure includes a dedicated segment for game content and systems. It does not contain substantive information to answer questions regarding specific topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
